series_metadata.series_title: District fiscal monitoring files (Management Assistant Reviews) "MARS"
series_metadata.series_description: District educational financial records regarding how a district spends its special education funding.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Records must be maintained next regular audit by Auditor of State. Once audit has been performed, records can be destroyed. Records must be maintained they are audited by Auditor of State. Although these are regular auditors, period between audits can vary. ; Electronic: Records must be maintained next regular audit by Auditor of State. Once audit has been performed, records can be destroyed. Records must be maintained they are audited by Auditor of State. Although these are regular auditors, period between audits can vary
